topWin: Contract cleanup fixed silent schema drift across leaderboard, newsletter, and migration paths while adding a CI-ready authenticated portal lane.
topGap: Activation still depends on external execution for Cloudflare proxy, auth hardening, VAPID, newsletter secrets, and search verification.
ignisNote: The highest-leverage follow-through on a feature-rich repo was not more features but eliminating schema drift and making external blockers executable.
